title: Fresh Flame Grilled Kenyan Veal Skewers
description: A light Kenyan dish featuring veal, this recipe is perfect for those looking for a fresh and smoky flavor, and can be adapted to be vegan friendly by substituting the veal with a plant based alternative.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the veal to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated veal onto the wooden skewers.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the veal is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers on a tagliere, garnished with fresh herbs and a side of your choice.
